question: When you hear the word 'investing', what's the FIRST emotion you feel?

options.text: Excited — I want to grow my money!
Curious — I want to learn more
Nervous — What if I lose money?
Terrified — I'd rather keep it in savings

question: Imagine you invested Rs. 10,000 and it dropped to Rs. 8,000 in a week. What would you do?

options.text: Wait and watch — markets go up and down
Panic a little but hold on
Sell immediately — I can't handle this!

question: What's the biggest reason you haven't started investing yet?

options.text: I don't know where to start
I'm afraid of losing my hard-earned money
I've seen others lose money and it scares me
